hero.title: Packers & Movers in Haryana
hero.subtitle: Gurugram to Faridabad, Panipat to Rohtak — 5,043+ verified movers across 15 cities in Haryana.

intro:
Haryana is India's most industrialised state per capita and home to Gurugram — one of the fastest-growing corporate hubs in Asia. ShiftIndia connects you with 5,043+ verified movers across Gurugram, Faridabad, Panipat, Rohtak, Hisar, Ambala, Sonipat, Karnal, Bhiwani, Sirsa and 5 more cities.

From Gurugram's gleaming DLF towers and Cyber City office parks to Faridabad's industrial townships and Panipat's textile hubs, our KYC-verified vendors handle every category of home and office relocation across Haryana.
whyUs: Gurugram's high-rise society rules, Faridabad's industrial zoning and Haryana's National Highway network connecting to Delhi NCR require movers with wide reach and strong local compliance knowledge. Our vendors offer ₹5 lakh damage coverage, GPS tracking and pay-after-delivery on all Haryana moves.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Haryana?
faqs.a: Local 1 BHK moves within Haryana cities start at ₹3,000. Gurugram to Faridabad 2 BHK moves typically cost ₹5,000–₹10,000. Exact pricing depends on floor, inventory and packing.

faqs.q: Which cities in Haryana does ShiftIndia cover?
faqs.a: We cover 15 cities: Gurugram, Faridabad, Panipat, Rohtak, Hisar, Ambala, Sonipat, Karnal, Bhiwani, Sirsa, Hansi, Jind, Kaithal, Rewari and more.

faqs.q: Do you handle corporate office relocations in Gurugram's Cyber City?
faqs.a: Yes. We specialise in corporate office moves in Gurugram, including IT equipment packing, furniture dismantling and reassembly, and weekend moves to minimise business disruption.

faqs.q: Can you handle Haryana–Delhi NCR cross-border moves?
faqs.a: Yes. Gurugram–Delhi, Faridabad–Delhi and Haryana–Noida moves are fully covered within our NCR network with the same vendors, transparent pricing and GPS tracking.
